question: Would  bald eagle deliver an urgent message before B-52?
context: A bald eagle can travel up to 99 MPH.
The B-52 is a US air bomber that can travel up to 650 MPH.
response:
<reasoning>
A bald eagle can travel up to 99 MPH.
The B-52 can travel up to 650 MPH.
99 MPH is less than 650 MPH.
The bald eagle is slower than the B-52.
The bald eagle would not deliver an urgent message before the B-52.
<answer> No
claims: A bald eagle can travel up to 99 MPH
The B-52 can travel up to 650 MPH
The bald eagle is slower than the B-52
The bald eagle would not deliver an urgent message before the B-52
